---
title: "Viewing All Idp Projects"
---

The All IDP projects page enables you to view a list of existing IDP projects.

To view all IDP projects:

In the Studio Modeler application, on the left navigation pane, click All IDP projects. A list of existing IDP projects are displayed.    ![](data:image/gif;base64,)
The following fields are displayed.

| Field | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Project Name | This is the name of the project |
| Updated | This is the date and time when the project was last updated. |
| Created | This is the date and time when the project was created. |
| Created By | This is the name of the user who created the project. |
| Latest Project Release | This is the date and time when a new version of the project was last released. |
| Collaborators | This displays the names of the project collaborators. |
| Options | This is an ellipsis displaying a menu with further options. |

Note:
- To add or remove a project from favorites, click the star icon next to the relevant project.
- To view the list of favorite projects, under IDP Configuration, click Favorite IDP projects.
- To rename the project, click the ellipsis next to the relevant project on the All IDP projects page and then select the Edit project name option.
- To delete a project, click the ellipsis next to the relevant project on the All IDP projects page and then select the Delete project option.
- To download a project, click the ellipsis next to the relevant project on the All IDP projects page and then select the Download project option. The project is downloaded in a .zip file format.
- To add collaborators to a project, click the ellipsis next to the relevant project on the All IDP projects page and then select the Collaborators option.
- To configure document processing, click the ellipsis next to the relevant project on the All IDP projects page and then select the Document Processing option. For more information, refer to the Configuring Document Processing section.
- To view a project's released version, click the ellipsis next to the relevant project on the All IDP projects page and then select the View project releases. option.
- To upload an existing project, click Upload Project.
- To create a new IDP project, click Create Project. For more information, refer to the Creating an IDP Project topic.
- To delete multiple projects, enable the project selection by selecting the check box next to Create Project. Check boxes are displayed next to each project. Select the projects that you want to delete, click the ellipsis and then click Delete selected projects.
